title: trisetum johnstonii
intro: Trisetum johnstonii, also known as Johnston's Hair Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trisetum johnstonii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Trisetum johnstonii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use and availability may vary depending on the region.
